```prompt
---
agent: refactorkit.diagnose
---

Run a comprehensive code health diagnosis — lint errors (ruff, mypy), deprecations, logical errors, test warnings, coverage gaps, and test leakage. Produces a unified diagnosis report with cross-analysis and priority matrix.

Use keywords to run selective diagnosis: "lint", "deprecation", "logical", "warning", "coverage", "leakage", or "full" for all.

```
